innateAbility.name: Bitter Chill
innateAbility.description: Applies an attack speed slow on all enemy units within the radius.

abilities.name: Ice Shards
abilities.description: Throws a ball of frozen energy that damages all enemy units it comes in contact with.When the ball its point-targeted location, the shards are released, creating a temporary path blocker.

abilities.name: Snowball
abilities.description: Tusk begins rolling into a snowball, and exposes the unit-targeted enemy during its hold duration.

abilities.name: Launch Snowball
abilities.description: Launch the snowball toward the target.

abilities.name: Tag Team
abilities.description: Creates a negative debuff aura around Tusk, causing enemy units that are attacked under it to have reduced movement speed.

abilities.name: Drinking Buddies
abilities.description: Reaches out to tag an allied unit and pulls them closer.Grants both Tusk and the tagged ally bonus movement speed and bonus armor once tagged.

abilities.name: Walrus Kick
abilities.description: Kicks the closest enemy unit in a targeted direction, stunning, damaging, and slowing them.Upon the affected unit landing, Tusk deals damage to all enemy heroes within the landing radius.

abilities.name: Walrus PUNCH!
abilities.description: Applies a critical strike so powerful it launches its victim into the air.
